workstreams.title: Migrate linter code out of product-management-plugin

workstreams.title: Property-based template system: global base + scoped toggles + rules/automations bindings
workstreams.exit: templates: and automations: schema in core config with loader/serializer/scaffold; preview-first apply contract; CLI/plugin parity

workstreams.title: CLI as shift-left execution surface
workstreams.exit: template/report/export/run commands shipped; output-version 2; container registration via HC-1/HC-6

workstreams.title: Telemetry v2: lint-event v2, template-event v1, run-summary v1; ingest; committed rollups
workstreams.exit: template_events + lint_runs tables; CI commits docs/reports/lint/*.{md,json}; capture fail-open, gates fail-closed

workstreams.title: Reports left-nav surface in plugin
workstreams.exit: usage/coverage report from local rollup JSON; --ll-* tokens only; promote-to-guidance action

workstreams.title: harness-logs-analysis project
workstreams.exit: first findings report from real multi-container data; one recommendation lands upstream with measured follow-up

workstreams.title: Management plane app
workstreams.exit: v0 read-only panels: Scripts, Projects/CI-drift, Security, Insights

workstreams.title: Code-comment linting / agent header contract
workstreams.exit: lappe-header v1 schema ratified; code-checks enforcement on opted-in paths; script-index consumes metadata

workstreams.title: Product-management capability alignment
workstreams.exit: capability map documented; provider ships note-types; capabilities exposed via Obsidian + pm-vault CLI + management plane read-only
